name.zh: 塔科夫环卫工：阿迪达斯大金表

itemName.zh: Magnum Research “沙漠之鹰”Mk XIX .50 AE手枪
itemName.en: Magnum Research Desert Eagle Mk XIX .50 AE pistol

description.zh:
你好，你忙吗？你喜欢逛街吗？至少我喜欢！但不幸的是，塔科夫的ULTRA购物中心实在是太危险了。我听说那里虽然堆满了高价值的东西。显然，有个疯子在里面到处跑，烧杀抢掠占了仨。披笨重的护甲，穿着黑色带白色条纹的阿迪运动服，你不会看不见他的。

我有个想法，如果直接干掉这个疯子的话会让某些人觉得商场现在变得更安全了。你问我的计划？没错，我要你杀掉他然后拿走他的装备，打扮成他的样子，使用他的武器去干掉一批PMC。这样做一段时间会让人们觉得商场危险依旧。

Killa装备：
 - Maska-1SCh Killa特别版
 - 6B13M Killa特别版
 - RPK-16 或 AKMS 或 PP-19 Vityaz 或 TT-33

我为什么还要为你写下这些？反正你会拿走他的装备……算了，留着这张说明以防万一。
description.en:
Hello, you busy? Do you like shopping, because I do! Unfortunately the ULTRA shopping mall in Tarkov is way too hot. I heard that the place is stocked up with high value stuff. Apparently there is some maniac running around there who is looting everything and gunning down whoever he sees. Heavily armored and dressed in a black tracksuit with white stripes, you won't overlook him. I have an idea tho, just killing this psychopath would make some people think that the mall is safer now, so whats my plan now? Right, you kill him and then take his shit, smoke a bunch of PMC operatives while you are dressed like him, use one of his guns aswell. Do it for some time to make the people think that the mall is still heated.

Killa Gear :
 - Maska-1SCh Killa Edition / Diamond Age NeoSteel
 - 6B13M Killa Edition
 - RPK-16 / AKMS / PP-19 Vityaz / TT-33 / Desert Eagle Pistol

Why do I even need to write this down for you? You will take his gear anyway... forget it, keep this note just in case.
